nodes.name: sciona.mint.apc_module
nodes.conceptual_summary: Grouped atoms sharing an upstream family or module.
nodes.decomposition_rationale: Replaces singleton atom subpackages with a flat module layout.

nodes.name: apccoreevaluation
nodes.description: Executes average-product correction (APC) over the final two axes of a pairwise matrix.

inputs.name: x
inputs.constraints: required ndarray with at least two dimensions

nodes.conceptual_summary: Computes x - (row_sum * col_sum / total_sum), preserving input shape.
nodes.critic_notes: pubrev-019 remediated prior Autoregressive Predictive Coding drift to the average-product correction used by upstream MINT.
